title: HPC Routing Spine
description: Canonical routing index mapping (objectKind, tier, repo) to schemas, paths, invariants, metrics, and constraint formulas.

routingSpineVersion.description: Semantic version for the routing spine document, e.g. 1.0.0.

updatedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this routing spine was generated.

objectKinds.description: Routing entries for each supported object kind.

mathConstraints.description: Versioned mathematical constraints and derived formulas referenced by routing entries.

docHints.description: Optional documentation hints used to generate human-readable docs from this spine.

overview.description: High-level description of this routing spine.

repoName.description: Canonical repository name, e.g. Horror.Place or HorrorPlace-Atrocity-Seeds.

phaseName.description: CHAT_DIRECTOR phase in which this objectKind is legal for the route.

description.description: Human-readable description of this object kind.

allowedTiers.description: Tiers where this objectKind may exist.

routes.description: Per-tier, per-repo routing entries for this object kind.

schemaRef.description: Canonical JSON Schema URI or repo-relative path for this object kind.

aiAuthoringKind.description: Discriminator that must match AiAuthoringRequest.objectKind for this route.

defaultTargetPath.description: Repository-relative directory root where artifacts of this kind should be written.

path.description: Repository-relative path to the registry file that must reference this artifact.

schemaRef.description: JSON Schema URI or path for the registry entry type.

invariants.description: Invariant codes this object kind must declare bands for on this route.

metrics.description: Entertainment metric codes this object kind is expected to influence on this route.

constraints.description: Constraint identifiers drawn from mathConstraints that must hold for this route.

enforcesAdditionalPropertiesFalse.description: Indicates that the canonical schema for this route sets additionalProperties to false.

inputs.description: Invariant and/or metric codes used as inputs to this constraint.

output.description: Invariant or metric code constrained by this entry.

expressionRef.description: Path or URI to a separate JSON or Markdown document that defines the mathematical expression.

appliesToObjectKinds.description: Optional list of object kinds this constraint applies to. If empty or omitted, it may be used by any kind.
